commands.name: CleanLogs
commands.description: This will clean the log folder

options.name: --logfolderroot
options.description: defines that path to the root folder containg the log files. Default value: '~/Library/Logs/VisualStudio'

options.name: --folderPath
options.description: path to the folder that contains log files that will be deleted

commands.name: CompressLogs
commands.description: This will create a .zip of the existing log files. The file will be created by default in the log directory

options.name: --logfolderroot
options.description: defines that path to the root folder containg the log files. Default value: '~/Library/Logs/VisualStudio'

options.name: --filename
options.description: defines the filename of the log file that will be created. Default filename has a timestamp and version.

commands.name: KillVsmac
commands.description: This will kill the vsmac process and callstack will be written to the log file.

options.name: --name
options.description: Name of the process that will be killed. Default: 'VisualStudio'

options.name: --id
options.description: Process ID of the process to kill. If this and Process Name are passed, this will take precedent.

commands.name: OpenLogFolder
commands.description: Opens the log folder in Finder

options.name: --path
options.description: Path to the log folder which will be opened. Default value: '~/Library/Logs/VisualStudio'

commands.name: OpenTelemetryConfigFolder
commands.description: opens the telemetry config folder in Finder

commands.name: OpenTelemetryLogsFolder
commands.description: opens the folder that contains the telemetry log files
